attacking_style: Long-range breakaway rider who leads over penultimate climbs but struggles with final accelerations when fresh riders bridge. Capable of solo victories on HC summit finishes when left unchallenged.
team_tactics: Deployed as climbing domestique for team leaders (worked for ROGLIČ) despite own GC capabilities. Limited evidence of dedicated team support when riding for personal ambitions in stage hunts.
terrain_preference: High-altitude HC summit finishes with sustained gradients (La Plagne victory). Struggles when races require sharp accelerations or when faced with fresh riders bridging late.
vulnerability: Lacks final acceleration when caught by stronger finishers bridging from behind. Mechanicals at critical moments (broken wheel on final Giro climb). Cannot respond when elite climbers attack late.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist who leads over earlier climbs but fades when caught late (Vuelta, Giro evidence).
Emerged as HC-level summit finish winner in early twenties, beating established climbers like KUSS.
Accepts domestique duties for team leaders despite personal climbing strength (ROGLIČ support, tactical flexibility).
Strong sustained climbing but lacks explosive power to counter attacks from fresh riders.
form_trajectory: negative: 2021 showed breakthrough HC stage wins and elite climbing, but 2022 Vuelta showed declining ability to finish efforts when challenged
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6
